welcome.message: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.

dashboard.noCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.

agents.noCompany: Select a company to view agents.

empty.create: Create your first agent to get started.
empty.noMatch: No agents match the selected filter.

agentDetail.pendingApproval: This agent is pending board approval and cannot be invoked yet.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.canCreateAgentsDesc: Lets this agent create or hire agents and implicitly assign tasks.
permissions.enabledAutoCreate: Enabled automatically while this agent can create new agents.
permissions.enabledExplicit: Enabled via explicit company permission grant.

prompts.localAdaptersOnly: Instructions bundles are only available for local adapters.

unsupported.openclaw: Paperclip cannot manage OpenClaw skills here. Visit your OpenClaw instance to manage this agent's skills.
unsupported.other: Paperclip cannot manage skills for this adapter yet. Manage them in the adapter directly.

skills.importFirst: Import skills into the company library first, then attach them here.
skills.userInstalled: User-installed skills, not managed by Paperclip
skills.missingFromLibrary: Requested skills missing from the company library
skills.manageInAdapter: Manage skills in the adapter directly.

runs.resumeSkipped: Resume request was skipped because the agent is not currently invokable.
runs.retrySkipped: Retry was skipped because the agent is not currently invokable.
runs.clearSessionConfirm: Clear session for {{count}} issue(s) touched by this run?
runs.noTranscript: No persisted transcript for this run.

workspace.loadLogError: Failed to load workspace operation log
workspace.title: Workspace ({{count}})

keys.created: API key created — copy it now, it will not be shown again.
keys.description: API keys allow this agent to authenticate calls to the Paperclip server.

issues.noCompany: Select a company to view issues.

projects.noCompany: Select a company to view projects.

goals.noCompany: Select a company to view goals.

activity.noCompany: Select a company to view activity.

costs.noCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.pageDescription: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.

overview.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
overview.budgetConsumed: % of monthly budget consumed in this range.
overview.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
overview.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
overview.noFinanceEvents: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

budgets.controlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.

metric.incidentsDesc: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
metric.approvalsDesc: Budget override approvals awaiting board action

budgets.resolveHardStops: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
budgets.agentPolicy: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
budgets.projectPolicy: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
budgets.empty: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

providers.noCostEvents: No cost events in this period.
providers.selectDates: Select a start and end date to load data.

billers.noEvents: No billable events in this period.

finance.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
finance.ledgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
finance.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
finance.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative

inbox.noCompany: Select a company to view inbox.

empty.noMatch: No inbox items match these filters.

companySettings.noCompany: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettings.title: Company Settings

field.companyNameDesc: The display name for your company.
field.descriptionDesc: Optional description shown in the company profile.
field.logoDesc: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
field.brandColorDesc: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
field.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
field.requireApprovalDesc: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

hiring.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.requireApprovalDesc: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

invites.title: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.desc: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.

packages.moved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages.

danger.archiveDesc: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
danger.archiveConfirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.

company.title: Name your company
company.desc: This is the organization your agents will work for.
company.missionPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

agent.title: Create your first agent
agent.desc: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
agent.envCheckDesc: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.

task.title: Give it something to do
task.desc: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
task.descriptionPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

launch.title: Ready to launch
launch.desc: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

org.noCompany: Select a company to view org chart.
org.empty: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.
org.noAgents: No agents in the organization. Create agents to build your org chart.

skills.title: Company skills
skills.desc: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in Paperclip runtime skills are added automatically.
skills.empty: No optional company skills installed yet.

routineDetail.name: Name
routineDetail.selectCompanyMessage: Select a company to view routines.

routines.title: Routines
routines.selectCompanyMessage: Select a company to view routines.
routines.noRoutinesMessage: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

companySkills.title: Company Skills
companySkills.selectSkillMessage: Select a skill to inspect its files.
companySkills.selectCompanyMessage: Select a company to manage skills.
companySkills.pasteSourcePlaceholder: Paste path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command

issuesList.noIssuesMatch: No issues match the current filters or search.

newAgentDialog.askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent

agentConfig.name: Name
agentConfig.title: Title
agentConfig.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent can do...
agentConfig.promptTemplatePlaceholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
agentConfig.promptTemplateWarningEdit: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
agentConfig.promptTemplateWarningCreate: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Prefer small task framing and variables like {{ context.* }} or {{ run.* }}; avoid repeating stable instructions here.
agentConfig.bootstrapPromptPlaceholder: Optional initial setup prompt for the first run
agentConfig.bootstrapPromptWarning: Bootstrap prompt is legacy and will be removed in a future release. Consider moving this content into the agent's prompt template or instructions file instead.

env.createSecretTitle: Create secret from current plain value
env.sealTitle: Store value as secret and replace with reference
env.autoInjected: PAPERCLIP_* variables are injected automatically at runtime.

budgetIncident.projectPaused: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetIncident.scopePaused: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.

budgetPolicy.validAmount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.

devBanner.autoRestartIdle: Auto-restart will trigger when the instance is idle

general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
general.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.noHeartbeatsMessage: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDevServerDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

pluginManager.title: Plugin Manager
pluginManager.installDescription: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
pluginManager.noPluginsDesc: Install a plugin to extend functionality.

pluginSettings.author: Author
pluginSettings.noSettings: This plugin does not require any settings.

auth.signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
auth.signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
auth.name: Name
auth.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.

companies.deleteConfirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.
